page.title: Integrations
page.description: Connect your project to a PM tool to receive status-change events and post test reports automatically.
page.selectTool: Choose a PM tool to connect:
page.saveError: Failed to save the connection. Please check your input and try again.
page.loadError: Failed to load integration settings. Please try again.

status.authErrorMessage: Your PM tool token is invalid or expired — update it below to restore the integration.

validation.orgUrlInvalid: Organization URL must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

validation.baseUrlInvalid: Base URL must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.
validation.emailRequired: Email is required when API Token auth is selected.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

webhookSetup.title: Webhook Setup
webhookSetup.secretMaskedInfo: The webhook secret is masked after the first view. Use "Regenerate" to create a new one.
webhookSetup.instructionsAdo: In Azure DevOps, go to Project Settings → Service Hooks → Create Subscription → Web Hooks. Paste the webhook URL above and set the secret to the value above.
webhookSetup.instructionsJira: In Jira, go to Settings → System → WebHooks. Paste the webhook URL above. Testurio validates requests using the shared secret shown above.

regenerateDialog.title: Regenerate Webhook Secret
regenerateDialog.message: This will immediately invalidate the current webhook secret. You must update the webhook configuration in your PM tool with the new secret, otherwise webhook events will be rejected.

remove.warning: Removing the integration will immediately stop any active test run for this project, clear any queued test jobs, and deregister the webhook from your PM tool. This action cannot be undone.

workItemTypeFilter.title: Work Item Type Filter
workItemTypeFilter.description: Only webhook events for the listed issue types will trigger a test run. Type names are matched exactly as reported by your PM tool (case-sensitive).
workItemTypeFilter.saveError: Failed to save the work item type filter. Please try again.

validation.atLeastOne: At least one work item type must be selected
